nodes.label: Video Selection and Play Registration Flow (seleccionarYRegistrarVideo)
nodes.rationale: Sets vista=reproductor and fires POST /videos/:id/view + POST /history/:id on video select to track views and history atomically

nodes.label: Progress % Calculation via JOIN Against Current Playlist (orphaned lessons excluded)
nodes.rationale: lesson_progress JOINed with profesor_playlist_videos — if professor deletes a lesson, orphaned progress rows are excluded so deleted content does not inflate the percentage
nodes.norm_label: progress % calculation via join against current playlist (orphaned lessons excluded)

nodes.label: Express Route Order Gotcha: /mis-cursos Before /:id
nodes.rationale: The /mis-cursos static route must be registered before /:id dynamic route in Express to avoid /mis-cursos matching as an id param

nodes.label: Enrollment Gate for Reviews (403 if not enrolled — PUT /api/cursos/:id/reviews)
nodes.rationale: Only enrolled users may submit a review, enforced server-side, to prevent uninformed ratings

nodes.label: In-memory Rate Limit (10 req/min/user, Map-based, MVP non-distributed)
nodes.rationale: Map<userId, timestamps[]> with 60s window — acknowledged MVP that does not scale across multiple processes; distributed rate limit listed in backlog
nodes.norm_label: in-memory rate limit (10 req/min/user, map-based, mvp non-distributed)

nodes.label: User Banner 273 - GTA VI Promotional Poster
nodes.description: Grand Theft Auto VI promotional poster used as a user profile banner. Portrait orientation. Features the GTA logo at top, two characters (male and female) leaning against a classic car in the foreground, palm trees in the background, and a vibrant Miami/Vice City sunset sky with purple-to-orange gradient. Style is the official Rockstar Games GTA VI art direction with warm tropical aesthetic.
nodes.norm_label: user banner 273 - gta vi promotional poster
